method.section_subtitle: Personal Development Navigator — Internationally Registered Patent
method.description: The P.D.N method specializes in assessing people through a unique and innovative approach registered as a patent worldwide. The method brings a powerful new tool to the world — discovering the unique "Source Code" for each person's consciousness development.
method.core: The innovation in the method is the "Source Code" — a navigator for personal development, enabling a person to face life's challenges with ease and navigate their life to success. At its foundation is identifying the root fears and strengths of the individual.
method.metaphor: A tool that once discovered, you realize you've received an enormous gift for life. Like a "GPS for Life" that enables a person to reach their chosen destination.

founder.title: Nice to Meet You
founder.name: Pnina Ohana-Lublchik
founder.short_bio: For the past three decades, I've dedicated my life to searching for the "diamond" — that power and unique ability within every person to fulfill their purpose. Through my research, I discovered that every person carries a "Source Code" — an inner cipher and compass for consciousness transformation.
